healthcareProviderRecordId.title: HealthcareProvider Record Id
healthcareProviderRecordId.description: HealthcareProvider record Id passed from the doctor-finding topic. Do not ask the patient for this value.

patientUserId.title: Patient User Id
patientUserId.description: Pass the Loggedin patient id through variable Onco_LoggenIn_User_Id

preferredStartTime.title: Preferred Start Time
preferredStartTime.description: Patient preferred start datetime to begin slot search. Collected from patient conversation.

searchWindowDays.title: Search Window Days
searchWindowDays.description: Optional. Number of days forward to search for slots. Defaults to 7 if not provided.
